label: Quantized inference & compressed deployment

node.label: Quantized inference & compressed deployment
node.definition: Quantized inference stores and computes weights or activations in reduced precision, trading numerical fidelity for lower memory, energy, and latency.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Quantized inference & compressed deployment is modeled as depending on Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion and feeding downstream nodes such as Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment, Image generation, editing & design.
examples: atlas downstream link to Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
atlas downstream link to Image generation, editing & design
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Quantized inference & compressed deployment has an `operationalizes` dependency on Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation because Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.
